title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.220 - Who may be made parties
text:
443.220.  Who may be made parties. — Any person claiming an interest in the mortgaged property or collateral may, on motion, be made defendant to the proceedings, and may answer in avoidance or bar of the deed, security agreement, or debt or damages and issue shall be made and tried as in other civil suits.
(RSMo 1939 § 3456, A.L. 1965 p. 114) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3069; 1919 § 2228; 1909 § 2835
